name: Extract clinical trial data from PDFs and log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## 🧪 Clinical Trial Document Analyzer

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for new trial PDFs
2. Downloads and extracts study data (phase, endpoints, sample size)
3. Pulls adverse event counts and dosing schedules
4. Logs structured data to Google Sheets
5. Sends Slack notification with summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for trial documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Study ID | Protocol | Phase | Sponsor | Indication | Design | Primary Endpoint | Secondary Endpoints | Sample Size | Duration | Total AEs | SAEs | Status | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Clinical research organizations
- Pharma regulatory teams
- Research coordinators

parameters.prompt: Extract clinical trial document data as flat fields. trialTitle, trialId, phase (e.g. Phase I, Phase II, Phase III), studyType, sponsor, indication, targetPopulation, primaryEndpointDescription, primaryEndpointMetric, secondaryEndpointsList (semicolon-separated secondary endpoints), totalSampleSize (number), treatmentGroupSize (number), controlGroupSize (number), inclusionCriteriaList (semicolon-separated inclusion criteria), exclusionCriteriaList (semicolon-separated exclusion criteria), drugName, dosage, routeOfAdministration, treatmentDuration, adverseEventsList (semicolon-separated adverse events with frequency), primaryResultSummary, statisticalSignificance, pValue, keyFindingsList (semicolon-separated key findings), trialStatus (ongoing/completed/terminated), studyStartDate, studyEndDate, clinicalTrialsGovId, irb, fundingSource.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = ($input.first().json?.data || $input.first().json) || {};
const fileName = $('New Trial Document').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('New Trial Document').item.json.id;

const findings = (data.keyFindingsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const adverse  = (data.adverseEventsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const findingsList = findings.map((f,i) => `${i+1}. ${f.trim()}`).join('\n') || 'N/A';
const adverseList  = adverse.map(a => `• ${a.trim()}`).join('\n') || 'None reported';

return [{ json: {
  trialTitle:   data.trialTitle   || 'Unknown Trial',
  trialId:      data.trialId      || 'N/A',
  phase:        data.phase        || 'N/A',
  studyType:    data.studyType    || 'N/A',
  sponsor:      data.sponsor      || 'N/A',
  indication:   data.indication   || 'N/A',
  drugName:     data.drugName     || 'N/A',
  dosage:       data.dosage       || 'N/A',
  treatmentDuration: data.treatmentDuration || 'N/A',
  totalSampleSize:   parseInt(data.totalSampleSize) || 0,
  primaryEndpointDescription: data.primaryEndpointDescription || 'N/A',
  primaryResultSummary: data.primaryResultSummary || 'N/A',
  statisticalSignificance: data.statisticalSignificance || 'N/A',
  pValue:       data.pValue       || 'N/A',
  findingsList, findingsCount: findings.length,
  adverseList,  adverseCount:  adverse.length,
  trialStatus:  data.trialStatus  || 'N/A',
  studyStartDate: data.studyStartDate || 'N/A',
  studyEndDate:   data.studyEndDate   || 'N/A',
  clinicalTrialsGovId: data.clinicalTrialsGovId || 'N/A',
  fundingSource: data.fundingSource || 'N/A',
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  fileId: fileId,
  studyId: data.clinicalTrialsGovId || data.trialId || "N/A",
  protocolNumber: data.trialId || "N/A",
  studyDesign: data.studyType || "N/A",
  studyDuration: data.treatmentDuration || "N/A",
  primaryEndpoint: data.primaryEndpointDescription || "N/A",
  sampleTarget: parseInt(data.totalSampleSize) || 0,
  sampleEnrolled: parseInt(data.totalSampleSize) || 0,
  sampleCompleted: parseInt(data.totalSampleSize) || 0,
  secondaryCount: (data.secondaryEndpointsList || "").split(";").filter(Boolean).length,
  aeTotal: adverse.length,
  aeSAE: 0,
  aeCommon: adverse.slice(0,3).map(a => a.trim()).join("; ") || "None",
}}];
